item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-14 - Today's Summary
item.description: Developer attention is heavily concentrated on AI agent frameworks and MCP/tool-calling categories, with both showing strong sustained growth. Agent-Reach (28k stars, +1,350 daily) and addyosani/agent-skills (58k stars, +1,919 daily) are the top performers, each accelerating over the past week. The coding agent category also remains hot, though its average daily delta of 4,317 is inflated by a single high-velocity project. Notably, no new Product Hunt launches or cross-source signals appeared today, suggesting the momentum is organic and community-driven rather than launch-triggered. The absence of fresh launches may indicate a lull before a new wave of agent-related releases. Top projects: LMCache/LMCache, microsoft/PowerToys, iptv-org/iptv, Panniantong/Agent-Reach, addyosmani/agent-skills, chopratejas/headroom, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, kenn-io/agentsview, nexu-io/open-design, tirth8205/code-review-graph, affaan-m/ECC Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

item.title: [sustained_hot] LMCache/LMCache (+343 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: LMCache is a vendor-neutral KV cache management layer that turns LLM inference KV caches into persistent, reusable, and observable assets across serving engines and hardware. Why it matters: With 9,009 stars, a 24-hour delta of +343 stars, and sustained commit activity (last push within 7 days), LMCache is experiencing strong, consistent growth. The acceleration ratio is low (1.0), indicating steady organic interest rather than a sudden spike. This sustained momentum, combined with recent releases (multiprocess architecture, agentic workload benchmarks on AMD MI300X) and ecosystem integrations (NVIDIA Dynamo, PyTorch Foundation, Redis), makes it a hot project in the LLM inference space. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward treating KV caches as persistent, reusable infrastructure rather than ephemeral state. For AI developers, adopting LMCache can unlock significant performance gains without vendor lock-in, and its observability features enable better debugging and optimization of inference pipelines. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] microsoft/PowerToys (+419 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of over 30 free utilities that supercharge Windows productivity and customization. Why it matters: With 134,647 stars, 436 stars in the last 24 hours, and a sustained_hot trend, PowerToys continues to see strong daily interest. The low acceleration (1) indicates steady, organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This consistent attention reflects its status as a must-have tool for Windows power users. Developer insight: For AI developers, PowerToys shows that practical, non-AI productivity tools still command massive attention. However, its inclusion in 'Other AI' category suggests potential for AI integration (e.g., smart paste, OCR). The project's scale and community offer a platform for AI-powered features. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] iptv-org/iptv (+1560 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A massive, community-curated collection of publicly available IPTV channel playlists from around the world. Why it matters: With 119k stars and a 24-hour delta of +1,281 stars, this project shows sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating steady organic interest rather than a sudden spike. It remains one of the most-starred repositories on GitHub, consistently attracting thousands of new stars daily. Developer insight: For AI developers, this repo signals the value of curated, structured datasets. The underlying database could be used to train models for channel classification, content recommendation, or stream quality prediction. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1350 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI coding agents zero-friction access to read and search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — without any API fees. Why it matters: With 26,660 stars and a 7-day average of 800 new stars per day, Agent Reach is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24-hour delta of 597 and acceleration of 0.7 indicate a steady, organic surge — not a one-day spike. This momentum suggests broad, ongoing adoption among AI developers who need their agents to interact with the open web. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' as a new category: tools that abstract away platform-specific barriers (API costs, login requirements, anti-bot measures) so agents can operate freely. The sustained star growth indicates strong product-market fit and a clear demand for open-source, community-maintained alternatives to paid data APIs. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] addyosmani/agent-skills (+1919 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A curated pack of 24 production-grade engineering skills packaged as Markdown workflows for AI coding agents, covering the full development lifecycle from spec to ship. Why it matters: The repo is experiencing explosive growth with 58,952 stars, a 24-hour delta of 1,919, and a 7-day delta of 10,228. The three-day average star delta is 2,396.7, and the acceleration ratio is 0.8 (high but not sudden breakout). This sustained hot trend reflects massive developer interest in standardizing AI agent behavior for production code. Developer insight: The rapid adoption signals a shift: developers are moving from 'prompting agents' to 'governing agents' with structured workflows. This repo is a blueprint for how agent behavior can be standardized, and it may influence how future AI coding tools design their skill systems. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+12169 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Headroom compresses tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks by 60–95% before they reach the LLM, preserving answer quality while slashing token costs. Why it matters: With 26,586 stars and a 24-hour delta of 11,923, Headroom is experiencing explosive growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating sustained hot momentum rather than a sudden spike. This level of attention signals a massive unmet need for token optimization in the AI agent ecosystem. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'context engineering' as a first-class concern in AI development. Tools that optimize token usage without degrading quality will become essential infrastructure, much like caching layers for databases. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+300 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for performance and prefix-cache stability. Why it matters: With 21,906 stars, a 24-hour delta of 300, and a 7-day average delta of 436.1, this project shows sustained high velocity. The acceleration of 0.7 indicates continued strong growth without sudden spikes, making it a consistent hot project in the AI coding agent space. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward specialized, model-native agents that optimize for specific LLM features (like prefix caching). Developers should consider building agents that are tightly coupled to a model's strengths rather than generic multi-model wrappers. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+424 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production-grade agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: With 31,756 stars, a 24-hour delta of +319, and a 7-day average of +421.6, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 (high) indicates strong organic momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting broad, steady adoption. The project's claim of 150,639 readers and 241,669 page views in the last 30 days further confirms real-world traction. Developer insight: The project signals a shift in how AI education is consumed: developers want hands-on, code-first, artifact-producing curricula that integrate with their existing tools (Claude, Cursor, etc.). The emphasis on MCP servers and agent skills points to a growing ecosystem around agentic workflows. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] kenn-io/agentsview (+735 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Local-first analytics and cost tracking for 20+ AI coding agents, with a 100x faster replacement for ccusage. Why it matters: The project has 2,424 stars and gained 645 stars in the last 24 hours, indicating a massive surge in attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), meaning this is not a sudden breakout but rather a sustained hot trend that has been building momentum. The high star count and daily delta suggest strong community interest and adoption. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward multi-agent workflows where developers demand observability and cost control. The local-first approach addresses privacy concerns, and the broad agent support makes it a versatile tool for the AI development ecosystem. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+483 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative that turns your laptop into an agent-native design studio with 259+ skills, 142+ design systems, and MCP integration for 21 coding agents. Why it matters: With 64,524 stars, a 24-hour delta of +483, and a 7-day average of +647 stars/day, this project is sustaining massive organic growth. The acceleration of 0.9 (high but not sudden) indicates steady, compounding interest — likely driven by the v0.10.0 release and the expanding list of supported coding agents (21 CLIs). Developer insight: This signals a shift toward agent-native design workflows where the CLI and MCP server replace the canvas. For AI developers, it means design is becoming a programmable, composable layer — not a separate tool. The BYOK proxy and local-first approach also reduce vendor lock-in and latency. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+33 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向一周增长 +336，属于持续升温信号。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] affaan-m/ECC (+747 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +747，总 stars 215,149，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low
